message:
fix: unify openDoltDB with openFixDB for timeout and password support (bd-s20p)

openDoltDB in validation.go was building DSNs without timeout or password,
causing potential hangs on unresponsive Dolt servers and auth failures.
Delegate to openFixDB which already has both.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
